creator: claudiu@casi.ro
text:
hello

I believe it's fixed now.
Please try again after updating ports tree.

This was caused by the modifications to the file 
/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk at revision r341335
12 hours later, at revision r341445 it was resolved.
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/Mk/bsd.port.mk?r1=341335&r2=341445

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-January/089347.html


best regards,
Claudiu
